value.name: sharedMemory
value.purpose: Local shared memory graph for agents that cannot all share one context window.

project.overview.summary: sharedMemory stores agent memories as a local graph with metadata and relations.

task.next-step.value: Import useful memories from an external AI using a strict JSON snapshot file.
task.next-step.summary: Next step is importing external AI memory through a JSON snapshot upload.

edges.reason: The import workflow helps populate the sharedMemory project graph.
